title: Full Login and Profile Update Flow

actions.instruction: Send POST request to /api/auth/login to get JWT token
actions.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/login to get JWT token using credentials from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the profile page in the browser
actions.description: Navigate to the profile page in the browser

actions.instruction: Verify the profile page shows the current user name
actions.description: Verify the profile page shows the current user name

actions.instruction: Update the display name field to "Test Admin"
actions.description: Update the display name field to 'Test Admin'

actions.instruction: Send GET request to /api/auth/profile to verify the change
actions.description: Send GET request to /api/auth/profile to verify the change

actions.instruction: Assert response body field "user.display_name" equals "Test Admin"
actions.description: Verify the user.display_name field in the response body equals 'Test Admin'
